foundations.reason: Achalasia is the primary indication for POEM — Chicago classification subtypes guide treatment selection

foundations.reason: POEM performs selective inner circular muscle myotomy at the LES — understanding LES tone mechanisms is essential

foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Submucosal tunneling technique requires knowledge of esophageal wall layers and GEJ anatomy

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: POEM is the endoscopic alternative to laparoscopic Heller myotomy — both target LES circular muscle

clinical.reason: Post-POEM manometry confirms adequate LES relaxation and treatment response

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Post-POEM GERD is a major complication since no anti-reflux procedure is added (unlike LHM+fundoplication)
